title: Onboarding - Eula page - App in the background
scenario: EULA page animation and Continue button break after app is backgrounded for 1-2 minutes during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (fresh install or after clearing data).
2. Observe the EULA / Privacy Policy acceptance screen is displayed with the Continue button visible and the background animation playing.
3. Press the Home button or switch to another app to put the Poly Studio Mobile app into the background.
5. Tap the Poly Studio Mobile app icon or use the app switcher to bring the app back to the foreground.
expected: The app remains on the EULA / Privacy Policy acceptance screen. The background animation is still playing, and the Continue button is still visible and blurred.
